message:
fix: switch rewards handler from Search API to REST Issues API (#9430)

The GitHub Search API caps results at 1,000 items regardless of
pagination. Users with more contributions were undercounted. Switch
to the REST Issues API per-repo which supports up to 10,000 items
per repo with proper pagination, matching the leaderboard generator.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
